title: GitHub API の 404 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: The article accurately identifies common causes of GitHub API 404 errors, such as incorrect resource names, insufficient permissions for private repositories, and API endpoint changes.
The troubleshooting steps and code examples provided are accurate and actionable.
The article correctly highlights GitHub API's specific behavior of returning a 404 for private resources when the user lacks permission, preventing information leakage.
All external URLs cited within the article (GitHub official documentation, Stack Overflow, GitHub Status Page) are correct and relevant to the claims made.
The information is highly fresh, with the article published recently (May 2026).

sources.title: Troubleshooting the REST API - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: When a 404 error is returned by the GitHub API, it indicates that the resource specified in the request does not exist on the server, or the server behaves as if it doesn't exist for a user without permission.

sources.title: Authenticating to the REST API - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: This error can occur even if GitHub API authentication is successful, and incorrect endpoint URLs or parameters are the main causes.

sources.title: LICENSE.txt - microsoft/vscode - GitHub
sources.claim: The example URL `https://api.github.com/repos/microsoft/vscode/contents/LICENSE.md` for the correct license file name is consistent with the actual repository content.

sources.title: Suddenly update repository API stopped working · community · Discussion #164900 - GitHub
sources.claim: APIエンドポイントで指定したリポジトリ名やオーナー名に誤りがあると、サーバーがそのリソースを検索できず404が返されます。(If there is an error in the repository name or owner name specified in the API endpoint, the server cannot find that resource and returns a 404.)

sources.title: Troubleshooting the REST API - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: プライベートリポジトリにアクセスする際、認証トークンが不足していたり、有効期限が切れていたり、そのリポジトリへのアクセス権限がないと404が返されます。GitHub APIは権限がない場合、存在しないふりをする設計になっています。(When accessing a private repository, if the authentication token is missing, expired, or you do not have access rights to that repository, a 404 will be returned. The GitHub API is designed to pretend that the resource does not exist if you do not have permission.)

sources.title: Package API: Getting HTTP response 404 on unauthorized access #30898 - GitHub
sources.claim: GitHub APIは権限がない場合、存在しないふりをする設計になっています。(The GitHub API is designed to pretend that the resource does not exist if you do not have permission.)

sources.title: API Versions - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: GitHub APIのバージョン更新により、エンドポイント形式が変わった場合や、非推奨となったエンドポイントを使用している場合に404が返されます。(If the endpoint format has changed due to a GitHub API version update, or if a deprecated endpoint is being used, a 404 will be returned.)

sources.title: Breaking changes - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: GitHub APIのバージョン更新により、エンドポイント形式が変わった場合や、非推奨となったエンドポイントを使用している場合に404が返されます。(If the endpoint format has changed due to a GitHub API version update, or if a deprecated endpoint is being used, a 404 will be returned.)

sources.title: An OpenAPI description for GitHub's REST API
sources.claim: パスパラメータの欠落またはフォーマット誤り (Missing or incorrectly formatted path parameters). Specifically, URL encoding of spaces (e.g., `my%20file.txt` instead of `my file.txt`) is crucial for correct path parameters.

sources.title: About the REST API - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: REST APIでは、エンドポイントのパス形式が厳密です。(In the REST API, the endpoint path format is strict.)

sources.title: Comparing GitHub's APIs - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: GraphQL APIを使う場合は、クエリの構造が異なり、404ではなく異なる形式のエラーレスポンスが返される可能性があります。(When using the GraphQL API, the query structure is different, and a different form of error response may be returned instead of a 404.)

sources.title: REST API endpoints for organizations - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: 公開リポジトリであっても、組織の設定により特定のエンドポイント（例：`/orgs/<org>/members`）が非公開の場合、権限がないユーザーには404が返されます。適切なスコープを持つPersonal Access Tokenを使用してください。(Even for a public repository, if certain endpoints (e.g., `/orgs/<org>/members`) are private due to organization settings, a 404 will be returned to users without permission. Use a Personal Access Token with the appropriate scope.)

sources.title: REST API endpoints for branches - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: ブランチ一覧確認 (`https://api.github.com/repos/<owner>/<repo>/branches`) is the correct endpoint to list branches.

sources.title: Newest 'github-api' Questions - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: GitHub API関連のStack Overflow (github-api タグ付き質問) is a valid community resource for GitHub API questions.

sources.title: REST API endpoints for users - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: The `curl` command to check token validity (`https://api.github.com/user`) uses the correct endpoint.

sources.title: GitHub REST API documentation - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: GitHub REST API ドキュメント (`https://docs.github.com/rest`) is the official documentation portal.

sources.title: Managing your personal access tokens - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: 認証ガイド (`https://docs.github.com/authentication/keeping-your-account-and-data-secure/managing-your-personal-access-tokens`) is the official guide for managing Personal Access Tokens.

sources.title: GitHub Status
sources.claim: GitHub Status Page (`https://www.githubstatus.com`) is the official page to check the status of GitHub services.

sources.title: REST API のトラブルシューティング - GitHubドキュメント
sources.claim: APIレスポンスヘッダーの確認 (Checking API response headers using `curl -i`) is a valid debugging technique for getting detailed information, including rate limits.

sources.title: How can I use github api to get all tags or releases for a project? - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: タグ一覧確認 (`https://api.github.com/repos/<owner>/<repo>/tags`) is the correct endpoint to list tags.

improvement_suggestions: Optional improvement: Clarify the status code for the 'Validation Failed' JSON example, as 'Validation Failed' typically corresponds to a 422 Unprocessable Entity error, not a 404. If it's not a 404, consider placing it in a separate 'Other Error Examples' section or specifying its appropriate status code for better accuracy.
